testcase.name: TestServerAddress
testcase.failure: === RUN TestServerAddress client_test.go:40: Expected error without absolute URL client_test.go:46: Expected parsing endpoint error --- FAIL: TestServerAddress (0.00s)

testcase.name: TestVersionsToImport_NoNamespaceFound
testcase.failure: === RUN TestVersionsToImport_NoNamespaceFound orb_import_test.go:157: assertion failed: expected error to contain "No namespace found", got "list namespace orb versions: no namespace found" --- FAIL: TestVersionsToImport_NoNamespaceFound (0.00s)

testcase.name: TestAdminDeleteNamespaceAlias_UnexpectedFailure
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestAdminDeleteNamespaceAlias_UnexpectedFailure admin_test.go:57: assertion failed: expression is false: strings.Contains(result.Stderr, "Namespace alias deletion failed for unknown reasons."): expected stderr to contain failure message, got: Error: namespace alias deletion failed for unknown reasons
--- FAIL: TestAdminDeleteNamespaceAlias_UnexpectedFailure (5.60s)

testcase.name: TestAdminDeleteNamespace_ListOrbsError
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestAdminDeleteNamespace_ListOrbsError admin_test.go:220: assertion failed: expression is false: strings.Contains(result.Stderr, "unable to list orbs: No namespace found"): expected stderr to contain orb list error, got: Error: unable to list orbs: no namespace found
--- FAIL: TestAdminDeleteNamespace_ListOrbsError (0.02s)

testcase.name: TestConfigPackListConfigError
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestConfigPackListConfigError config_test.go:139: assertion failed: --- result.Stderr +++ expected @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@ -Error: failed trying to marshal the tree to YAML : expected a map, got a `[]interface {}` which is not supported at this time for "/var/folders/1q/gw82bzm106z8f1zcfj1m9hq80000gn/T/circleci-cli-test-3811954590/myorb/config.yaml" +Error: Failed trying to marshal the tree to YAML : expected a map, got a `[]interface {}` which is not supported at this time for "/var/folders/1q/gw82bzm106z8f1zcfj1m9hq80000gn/T/circleci-cli-test-3811954590/myorb/config.yaml"
--- FAIL: TestConfigPackListConfigError (0.02s)

testcase.failure: === RUN TestOrbCategorizationCategoryNotExist/remove orb_test.go:3243: assertion failed: expression is false: strings.Contains(result.Stderr, fmt.Sprintf("Error: Failed to remove orb bar-ns/foo-orb from category Cloud Platform: %s", errorCause)) --- FAIL: TestOrbCategorizationCategoryNotExist/remove (0.05s)

testcase.name: TestOrbCategorizationCategoryNotExist
testcase.failure: === RUN TestOrbCategorizationCategoryNotExist --- FAIL: TestOrbCategorizationCategoryNotExist (0.10s)

testcase.name: TestSetupNoPromptMissingHostAndToken
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestSetupNoPromptMissingHostAndToken setup_test.go:253: assertion failed: --- result.Stderr +++ → @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@ -Error: no existing host or token saved. +Error: No existing host or token saved. The proper format is `circleci setup --host HOST --token TOKEN --no-prompt
--- FAIL: TestSetupNoPromptMissingHostAndToken (0.02s)

testcase.name: TestUpdateGithub403
testcase.failure:
=== RUN TestUpdateGithub403 update_test.go:245: assertion failed: expression is false: strings.Contains(result.Stderr, `Error: Failed to query the GitHub API for updates.`): expected stderr to contain error message, got: "Error: failed to query the GitHub API for updates.

This is most likely due to GitHub rate-limiting on unauthenticated requests.

To have the circleci-cli make authenticated requests please:

 1. Generate a token at https://github.com/settings/tokens
 2. Set the token by either adding it to your ~/.gitconfig or
 setting the GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.

Instructions for generating a token can be found at:
https://help.github.com/articles/creating-a-personal-access-token-for-the-command-line/

We call the GitHub releases API to look for new releases.
More information about that API can be found here: https://developer.github.com/v3/repos/releases/

: GET http://127.0.0.1:58779/api/v3/repos/CircleCI-Public/circleci-cli/releases: 403 []
" --- FAIL: TestUpdateGithub403 (0.03s)

testcase.name: TestConfig/test_ConfigQuery/returns_error_when_config_file_could_not_be_found
testcase.failure: === RUN TestConfig/test_ConfigQuery/returns_error_when_config_file_could_not_be_found config_test.go:73: Error Trace: /Users/Riasat/Desktop/git/circleci-cli/config/config_test.go:73 Error: "failed to load yaml config from config path provider: could not load config file at testdata/nonexistent.yml: open testdata/nonexistent.yml: no such file or directory" does not contain "Could not load config file at testdata/nonexistent.yml" Test: TestConfig/test_ConfigQuery/returns_error_when_config_file_could_not_be_found --- FAIL: TestConfig/test_ConfigQuery/returns_error_when_config_file_could_not_be_found (0.00s)

testcase.name: TestSplitIntoOrbNamespaceAndVersionInvalid
testcase.failure: === RUN TestSplitIntoOrbNamespaceAndVersionInvalid references_test.go:27: assertion failed: expected error "Invalid orb reference 'asdasd': Expected a namespace, orb and version in the format 'namespace/orb@version'", got "invalid orb reference 'asdasd': expected a namespace, orb and version in the format 'namespace/orb@version'" --- FAIL: TestSplitIntoOrbNamespaceAndVersionInvalid (0.00s)

testcase.name: TestSplitIntoOrbAndNamespaceInvalid
testcase.failure: === RUN TestSplitIntoOrbAndNamespaceInvalid references_test.go:39: assertion failed: expected error "Invalid orb catdog. Expected a namespace and orb in the form 'namespace/orb'", got "invalid orb catdog, expected a namespace and orb in the form 'namespace/orb'" --- FAIL: TestSplitIntoOrbAndNamespaceInvalid (0.00s)
